title: 3D Cosmos
description: Makes the sun and moon 3D. Like "Cubic Sun and Moon", but better suited for playing with shaders.
body:
DOES NOT WORK FOR 1.21.11+

The sun and moon in Minecraft look quite strange because their texture has not changed for over 10 years. The moon looks like a square but is illuminated in a circle and this is strange.

3D Cosmos fixes this problem by making the sun and moon cubes and also ensures that the moon retains all eight phases in the new style. This resource pack is similar to the "Cubic Sun & Moon" but is more suitable for playing with shaders.![Moon phases](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e54e07cdf11dd835654bfae5f436724339714982_0.webp)
